title: KryptoniteProjectRegistry
description: Schema for <skill-path>/data/registry.json — the global mapping from project-id (12-char hash of git remote URL or repo path) to project metadata. Recovery and resume detection both depend on this file parsing cleanly.

projects.description: Keyed by project-id (SHA-256 first 12 chars of git remote URL or absolute repo path).

name.description: Human-readable project name. Defaults to the basename of the repo path.

path.description: Absolute path to the project's repo root.

source.description: The string the project-id was hashed from — either the git remote URL or the absolute repo path.

created_at.description: ISO timestamp of when this project was first registered.

last_seen_at.description: Optional ISO timestamp of the last time the project was used. Updated on resume.
